fields.title: Campus SkillSwap Django Project
fields.summary: A Django web application that allows Baylor University students to post and browse skills they can teach or want to learn from other students on campus.
fields.business_problem: Students have valuable skills to share but no centralized platform to connect with peers who want to learn them.
fields.key_features: User registration and login, create and manage skill listings, browse and search skills, user profiles, admin panel
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — built all models, views, templates, URL routing, and admin configuration
fields.biggest_challenge: Configuring Django authentication and managing user-specific data
fields.lessons_learned: How to build a full-stack web application using Django's MVT architecture

fields.title: Machine Learning Classifier
fields.summary: A machine learning classifier built in Python using scikit-learn that predicts the species of an iris flower based on its physical measurements.
fields.business_problem: Demonstrate how machine learning can classify and predict outcomes from structured data.
fields.key_features: Loads Iris dataset, trains classification model, evaluates accuracy, outputs predictions
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — built full classifier pipeline
fields.biggest_challenge: Understanding how to split training and test data correctly
fields.lessons_learned: How to build a machine learning pipeline using scikit-learn

fields.title: Syllabus Chatbot
fields.summary: A syllabus chatbot built using Chatbase that answers student questions about class content and course information.
fields.business_problem: Students waste time searching through syllabi for basic course information — this chatbot provides instant answers.
fields.key_features: Natural language input, syllabus-aware responses, conversational interface, instant answers about class content
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — built and trained the chatbot using course syllabus data
fields.biggest_challenge: Getting the chatbot to return accurate, relevant answers from syllabus content
fields.lessons_learned: How to build and train a custom AI chatbot using existing documents

fields.title: n8n Agent Workflow
fields.summary: An automated n8n orchestrator workflow that collects client information via Google Forms and uses Gemini AI to generate service quotes and appointment times for a handyman company.
fields.business_problem: Handyman companies waste time manually quoting jobs and scheduling — this workflow automates the full intake process.
fields.key_features: Google Form triggers workflow, AI generates quote based on inputs, recommends appointment time based on urgency, fully automated
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — designed and built full workflow including agent logic and tool connections
fields.biggest_challenge: Configuring the AI agent to make correct decisions at each step and passing data correctly between nodes
fields.lessons_learned: How to build automated AI agent workflows using no-code tools

fields.title: LangChain AI Agent
fields.summary: A question-answering AI agent built with LangChain and Gemini that can respond to user queries through a Python application.
fields.business_problem: Demonstrates how LangChain agents extend basic AI capabilities by enabling structured, tool-augmented responses.
fields.key_features: Accepts natural language questions, returns AI-generated answers, built and tested in Python
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — built full agent including configuration and testing
fields.biggest_challenge: Getting the agent to correctly process and respond to varied question types
fields.lessons_learned: How LangChain agents work and how to integrate Gemini into a Python application

fields.title: Google AI Studio Media Project
fields.summary: A reimagined Star Wars 'I am your father' scene created using Google AI Studio and Gemini, recasting Darth Vader as LeBron James and Luke Skywalker as Bronny James.
fields.business_problem: Demonstrates how generative AI can be used as a creative production tool to recreate and remix media content.
fields.key_features: AI-generated media content, creative scene recreation, character reimagining using generative AI
fields.role_contribution: Sole developer — designed prompts and produced final media output
fields.biggest_challenge: Getting the AI to consistently generate content matching specific characters and scene context
fields.lessons_learned: How generative AI can assist in creative media production and how prompt design impacts output quality
